entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for disease resistance and yield traits

entities.description: An elite rice cultivar used as recurrent parent 1

entities.description: An elite rice cultivar used as recurrent parent 2

entities.name: BACTERIAL BLIGHT
entities.description: A bacterial disease affecting rice leaves

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting rice

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED FORWARD BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach used to derive disease resistant introgression lines

entities.name: MULTI-PARENT INTER-CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method involving crossing multiple parents to develop resistant lines

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze variability in yield traits

entities.name: BOX PLOTS
entities.description: A graphical method used to depict seasonal differences in phenotypic expression

entities.name: SNP-BASED BACKGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A molecular method used to determine genetic similarity and recovery of recurrent parents
